symptoms: Runny nose, sneezing, mild fever, sore throat
what_to_do: Rest, drink water, honey for cough, use saline spray
see_doctor: Fever > 101°F or symptoms > 10 days

symptoms: High fever, body aches, tiredness, dry cough
what_to_do: Rest in bed, drink fluids, take fever medicine
see_doctor: High fever, trouble breathing, symptoms > 1 week

symptoms: Fever, dry cough, tired, loss of taste/smell
what_to_do: Rest, isolate, drink water, check oxygen
see_doctor: Trouble breathing, chest pain, confusion

symptoms: Bad cough with mucus, chest discomfort, tired
what_to_do: Rest, drink warm fluids, avoid smoke
see_doctor: Cough > 3 weeks, fever, coughing blood

symptoms: High fever, trouble breathing, chest pain, chills
what_to_do: SEEK MEDICAL HELP NOW - Call emergency!
see_doctor: Immediately - this is an emergency

symptoms: Wheezing, trouble breathing, chest tightness
what_to_do: Use inhaler, sit up straight, stay calm
see_doctor: If inhaler not working, severe breathing trouble

symptoms: Pain in belly, bloating, nausea
what_to_do: Eat small meals, avoid spicy food, rest
see_doctor: Severe pain, vomiting blood, black poop

symptoms: Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, stomach cramps
what_to_do: Drink water, rest, eat bland food (bananas, rice)
see_doctor: Bloody poop, fever > 101°F, can't keep water down

symptoms: Heartburn, chest pain after eating, burping
what_to_do: Eat small meals, don't lie down after eating
see_doctor: Chest pain, trouble swallowing, weight loss

symptoms: Hard poop, straining, bloating
what_to_do: Drink water, eat fruits/vegetables, exercise
see_doctor: No poop > 1 week, severe pain, bleeding

symptoms: Pain in head, pressure, neck pain
what_to_do: Drink water, rest in dark room, cold compress
see_doctor: Severe pain, with fever, after head injury

symptoms: Bad headache, nausea, sensitive to light
what_to_do: Rest in dark quiet room, cold compress
see_doctor: Frequent attacks, severe pain, vision changes

symptoms: Lower back ache, stiff, hard to move
what_to_do: Gentle stretching, heat pack, good posture
see_doctor: Leg weakness, loss of bladder control, after injury

symptoms: Joint pain, swelling, stiff in morning
what_to_do: Gentle exercise, rest joints, warm bath
see_doctor: Sudden pain, fever, can't move joint

symptoms: Peeing a lot, burning when peeing, belly pain
what_to_do: Drink water, pee often, see doctor for medicine
see_doctor: Fever, back pain, blood in pee

symptoms: Very sore throat, fever, trouble swallowing
what_to_do: Gargle salt water, drink warm tea, see doctor
see_doctor: Trouble breathing, can't swallow, rash

symptoms: Face pain, stuffy nose, headache
what_to_do: Steam inhalation, saline spray, drink water
see_doctor: Fever > 102°F, symptoms > 10 days

symptoms: Ear pain, trouble hearing, fever
what_to_do: Warm compress, rest, pain medicine
see_doctor: Severe pain, fluid coming out, high fever

symptoms: Itchy, dry, red patches on skin
what_to_do: Moisturize daily, avoid scratching, cool bath
see_doctor: Infected skin, severe itching, not improving

symptoms: Pimples, blackheads, oily skin
what_to_do: Wash face twice daily, don't touch face
see_doctor: Severe acne, scarring, not getting better

symptoms: Red itchy welts, swelling
what_to_do: Take allergy medicine, cold compress
see_doctor: Trouble breathing, swelling of lips/tongue

symptoms: Circular red rash, itching, scaling
what_to_do: Use antifungal cream, keep area clean
see_doctor: Widespread, not improving, scalp infection

symptoms: Thirsty a lot, peeing a lot, tired, blurry vision
what_to_do: Check blood sugar, eat healthy, exercise
see_doctor: Very high/low blood sugar, confusion, fainting

symptoms: Often no symptoms, sometimes headaches
what_to_do: Eat less salt, exercise, take medicine
see_doctor: Chest pain, severe headache, trouble breathing

symptoms: Tired, pale skin, dizzy, cold hands
what_to_do: Eat iron-rich foods (spinach, meat), rest
see_doctor: Chest pain, severe fatigue, fainting

symptoms: Sneezing, runny nose, itchy eyes
what_to_do: Avoid triggers, take allergy medicine
see_doctor: Trouble breathing, swelling of lips/tongue

symptoms: Worry a lot, fast heartbeat, can't relax
what_to_do: Deep breathing, exercise, talk to someone
see_doctor: Chest pain, can't function, thoughts of suicide

symptoms: Sad all the time, no energy, no interest
what_to_do: Talk to someone, exercise, get sunlight
see_doctor: Thoughts of suicide, not eating, can't function

symptoms: Can't sleep, tired during day
what_to_do: No screens before bed, regular sleep time
see_doctor: Can't sleep > 3 weeks, affects daily life

symptoms: Headache, tired, can't relax, irritable
what_to_do: Exercise, relax, take breaks, talk to someone
see_doctor: Chest pain, can't function, severe symptoms

symptoms: Belly pain, back pain, bloating
what_to_do: Heat pack, gentle exercise, pain medicine
see_doctor: Severe pain, heavy bleeding, irregular periods
